user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Hudson's Bay Flagship (souvenir stop)
fields.description: Quick stop at the Hudson's Bay flagship (or nearby Roots) to pick up Canadian-themed souvenirs and last-minute gifts. Short browsing and gift-wrapping available; focused on easy-to-carry items before your departure.

insertion_point.reasoning: User asked for a souvenir stop before the CN Tower on Day 10 morning. Inserting at position 1 places it after the 7:30 AM breakfast and before the 10:00 AM CN Tower EdgeWalk; 8:30–9:30 allows shopping and walking to the CN Tower.
